$comment: Config-as-code SigNoz alert rules for finance_report (#373). The app references the alert name FinanceReportBackendErrorLogs in apps/backend/src/observability.py; this file is the reviewable source of truth. Applied idempotently by `invoke fr-observability.shared.apply-alerts`, which routes the rule to the shared Feishu/Lark bridge channel. The full SigNoz v2 threshold payload is derived from this shape by libs/observability_dashboards.py + libs/alerting.py.

rules.summary: finance-report-backend emitted ERROR/FATAL logs in the last 5 minutes. Runbook: docs/ssot/ops.alerting.md SOP-004.
